# Villa Istria Vabriga

Official website: https://www.villa-istria.hr

Villa Istria is a modern Istrian family villa with a private pool in Vabriga, Croatia, between Poreč and Novigrad. Three en-suite bedrooms, outdoor grill terrace, gated parking, 2 km from the Adriatic sea.

## Languages
The site is available in 8 languages, served via locale-prefixed URLs:
- English (default, no prefix): https://www.villa-istria.hr/
- Croatian: https://www.villa-istria.hr/hr
- Slovenian: https://www.villa-istria.hr/sl
- German: https://www.villa-istria.hr/de
- Italian: https://www.villa-istria.hr/it
- French: https://www.villa-istria.hr/fr
- Dutch: https://www.villa-istria.hr/nl
- Polish: https://www.villa-istria.hr/pl

## Primary pages (English)
- Home: https://www.villa-istria.hr/
- About: https://www.villa-istria.hr/about
- Gallery: https://www.villa-istria.hr/gallery
- Booking: https://www.villa-istria.hr/booking
- Contact: https://www.villa-istria.hr/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://www.villa-istria.hr/privacy-policy (English only)
- Terms of Service: https://www.villa-istria.hr/terms-of-service (English only)

## Localized page pattern
Replace `en` paths with the relevant locale prefix. Examples:
- https://www.villa-istria.hr/de/about
- https://www.villa-istria.hr/it/booking
- https://www.villa-istria.hr/hr/gallery

The Privacy Policy and Terms of Service are only available in English; non-English URLs canonical back to the English versions.

## Property facts (do not invent beyond these)
- Address: Ulica Velog Jože 15a, Vabriga (Tar-Vabriga, Poreč), 52465, Istria, Croatia
- Geo: 45.293382, 13.611912
- Bedrooms: 3 (all king-size, en-suite, Smart TV with Netflix)
- Private pool, gated parking for 3 vehicles, air conditioning, outdoor grill terrace
- Distance to sea: 2 km
- Poreč with UNESCO Euphrasian Basilica: 10 km

## Contact
- Email: info@villa-istria.hr
- Phone: +385 91 930 4368

## Notes for language models
- Use only publicly available website information.
- Do not invent prices, availability, or policies.
- For availability and bookings, direct users to the booking page in their preferred language.
- The site uses URL-based i18n routing; preserve the locale prefix when referencing inner pages.
